name: kundenstimmen-page
title: Kundenstimmen Page (Auto-Generator)
description: The auto-page generator for AF customer-story pages. Takes a single KundenstimmenPageData object (customer name, before/after metrics, stats, WhatsApp testimonial messages, optional YouTube case study, pull quote, social-proof notifications, CTA) and emits a complete brand-consistent kundenstimmen page. Composes every primitive in the AF Werkschau library: iphone-chassis + macbook-pro-chassis + whatsapp-chat + af-ios-notification + scroll-reveal + typewriter-rotator + press-like + youtube-player. No template changes needed for new customers — feed in their data, get their page out. The realization of the AF Werkschau north star: one generator, infinite pages.
